components.text:
I broke through my first realm on accident. I had been in meditation for what I thought was an hour — it was four days. When I opened my eyes, the air felt different and a wound had closed without treatment.
I did not understand what had happened. I wrote it down anyway. If something works, record it first and explain it later.

There are realms above the one you occupy. Each is a threshold that looks like a wall until something inside you accumulates enough that it cannot hold.
Breakthroughs are not achievements you reach for.

They are moments when what you have built exceeds the boundary on its own.
Cultivate consistently. The threshold breaks when it is ready, not when you are impatient.
